preview.prebuildCommand: if [ -f scripts/patch-slider-codegen.js ]; then SDIR=scripts; else SDIR=artifacts/kobiton-expense-tracker/scripts; fi && node $SDIR/patch-slider-codegen.js && node $SDIR/assert-slider-clean.js && npx expo prebuild --clean

simulator.prebuildCommand: if [ -f scripts/patch-slider-codegen.js ]; then SDIR=scripts; else SDIR=artifacts/kobiton-expense-tracker/scripts; fi && node $SDIR/patch-slider-codegen.js && node $SDIR/assert-slider-clean.js && npx expo prebuild --clean

production.prebuildCommand: if [ -f scripts/patch-slider-codegen.js ]; then SDIR=scripts; else SDIR=artifacts/kobiton-expense-tracker/scripts; fi && node $SDIR/patch-slider-codegen.js && node $SDIR/assert-slider-clean.js && npx expo prebuild --clean
